name: Cinnamon Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sweet dough. Grease a 13" x 9" baking pan well.
In a small bowl, combine brown sugar, pecans, raisins, and cinnamon. Set aside.
Roll the dough into an 18" x 12" rectangle. Brush with melted butter; sprinkle with the sugar mixture.
2. Starting at one of the 18-inch sides, roll the dough in a jelly-roll fashion.
Pinch the seam to seal it. With the roll seam-side down, cut the dough crosswise
into 15 slices and place them in the pan, cut side down. Cover; let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 45 minutes.
3. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
Bake for 25 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool slightly in the pan on a wire rack.
Spread with glaze if desired. To serve: Pull apart with forks.
Sugar Glaze (optional):
In a small bowl, stir together 2 cups confectioner's sugar, 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract,
and about 3 tablespoons water until smooth.
